title: Kobo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kobo with a Z-Score of +3.26. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kobo are extremely hot and dry, with a humidity level of 22% and a wind speed of 3.4 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 10.4 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The critical level of the heat wave poses a significant threat to the city's infrastructure and residents, with potential power outages and water shortages.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
